1078.issue: [W1078] "common.materialize" is deprecated for admin >= 5 at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.energymanager/blob/master/io-package.json). Please use property "common.adminUI.config".

3009.issue: [W3009] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" is missing recommended concurrency configuration. See "https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.example/blob/e7db900495bb3c2b89dc35d863dda4ccf33f5def/JavaScript/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml#L17" for details.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5022.issue: [S5022] Please consider migrating to admin 5 UI (jsonConfig) or react based UI.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#125] "[iobroker-bot] Setup Auto-Merge for ioBroker-Bot PRs"](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.energymanager/issues/125)

0050.issue: [W0050] 'request' package is deprecated and no longer maintained. Consider migrating to native 'node:fetch' or 'axios' if more complex functionality is needed.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.10.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.energymanager/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
